extensionName.message: Dark Mode for Chrome — Night & Eye Care
extensionName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome toolbar and Web Store

extensionDescription.message: Dark mode, midnight black, and black & white reading modes for websites in Chrome. Improve readability, reduce eye strain, and schedule a more comfortable browsing experience.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store

toggleDarkMode.description: Accessible label for the master dark mode toggle

pauseOnSite.message: Pause dark mode on this site
pauseOnSite.description: Button to whitelist the current site

enhancedMode.description: Label for the invert-based fallback dark mode

schedule.description: Label for the sunset/sunrise scheduling feature

whitelist.description: Footer button to open the whitelist panel
